views.name: ShoppingListView
views.purpose: The primary grocery checklist — the only view users need. Top section has an inline text field with a '+' button for rapid item entry; typing a name auto-suggests a category (e.g., 'milk' → Dairy). Below that, a slim progress bar shows 'X of Y items' with a fill animation. Items are grouped into collapsible sections by GroceryCategory, each with a colored category icon header. Each item row displays a circular checkbox, item name, and a subtle 'qty × unit' badge on the trailing side. Tapping an item toggles its checked state: checked items get a strikethrough animation, dim to 50% opacity, and slide down into a collapsible 'In Cart' section at the bottom. Swipe left to delete an item, long-press to edit quantity/unit/notes in a compact popover. When all items are checked, a celebratory checkmark animation plays with a 'Clear Cart' button that archives the trip and resets the list. Empty state shows a cart illustration with 'Your list is empty — start adding items above.'

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uncheckedItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All items where isChecked == false, displayed in the active shopping sections

viewModelComputedProperties.name: checkedItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All items where isChecked == true, displayed in the collapsed 'In Cart' section

viewModelComputedProperties.name: itemsByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unchecked items grouped by category for section display, sorted by category order

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeCategories
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Categories that have at least one unchecked item, sorted in standard grocery aisle order

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalItemCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of items on the current list (checked + unchecked)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: checkedCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of items already checked off

viewModelComputedProperties.name: shoppingProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of items checked off (0.0 to 1.0), drives the progress bar fill

viewModelComputedProperties.name: isListComplete
viewModelComputedProperties.description: True when all items are checked — triggers the completion animation and Clear Cart button

viewModelComputedProperties.name: suggestedCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Auto-detected category based on the current text in the add field, using keyword matching (e.g., 'banana' → produce, 'yogurt' → dairy)

dailyGoal.description: Not applicable — grocery lists are event-driven, not daily habits

domainLogic.streakDefinition: Not applicable for grocery lists — there is no daily cadence to track
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track shopping trip frequency (per week/month), average item count per trip, and most-purchased categories to surface buying patterns
insights: Most frequently purchased items across all trips (top 10 by frequency)
Average number of items per shopping trip
Category distribution — percentage breakdown of items by grocery category
Shopping frequency — average trips per week over the last month
